queries.question: Provide me with the jurisdiction name that is common for all legal affairs reporters.
queries.sql: SELECT Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_name  from Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions join Jurisdictions on Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_id = Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_id join Legal_Affairs_Reporters on Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.legal_affairs_reporter_id = Legal_Affairs_Reporters.reporter_id   GROUP BY Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.legal_affairs_reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Legal_Affairs_Reporters)

queries.question: For each legal affairs reporter, give me the corresponding jurisdiction names.
queries.sql: select legal_affairs_reporters.name , jurisdictions.jurisdiction_name from Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions join Jurisdictions on Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_id = Jurisdictions.jurisdiction_id join Legal_Affairs_Reporters on Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions.legal_affairs_reporter_id = Legal_Affairs_Reporters.reporter_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?jurisdiction_name WHERE {
  ?legal_affairs_reporters_jurisdictions a :Legal_Affairs_Reporters_Jurisdictions .
  ?jurisdictions a :Jurisdictions .
  ?legal_affairs_reporters_jurisdictions p:hasJurisdictions ?jurisdictions .
  ?legal_affairs_reporters a :Legal_Affairs_Reporters .
  ?legal_affairs_reporters_jurisdictions p:hasLegal_Affairs_Reporters ?legal_affairs_reporters .
  ?legal_affairs_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?jurisdictions p:jurisdiction_name ?jurisdiction_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which jurisdiction names are associated with each legal affairs reporter?
